# do-epub-studio

A web-based EPUB reader and editorial workspace. Cloudflare-Pages-hosted SPA
backed by a Cloudflare Worker (Hono) with gated access, signed-URL file
delivery, and a PWA offline reader.

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript 6 (strict), Vite 8, React 19, Zustand 5, Tailwind 4
- EPUB.js (`@intity/epub-js`) for rendering, DOMPurify for sanitization
- Hono 4 + Cloudflare Workers (R2 + D1 + KV) backend
- Turbo monorepo (apps: web, worker; packages: shared, schema, reader-core, ui, testkit)
- Vitest 4 + Playwright (forks pool) for testing
- OKLCH design tokens, View Transitions, semantic-html-first UX

## Key Conventions

- Conventional commits (`feat:` / `fix:` / `perf:` / `ci:` / `docs:` / `a11y:` / `security:`), max 72 chars
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility — semantic design tokens, skip links, color contrast
- All user content MUST be sanitized with DOMPurify (see `sanitizeEpubDocument`)
- No direct DOM manipulation — use React refs
- Argon2id for password hashing; never bcrypt/scrypt
- R2 file URLs are signed via Workers; never exposed to clients
- traceId on every critical UI action (`logClientEvent` from `client-logger`)
- Multi-signal locators for annotations (CFI + text + chapter) per ADR-006
- Regex guarded against untrusted input (`matchBounded` / `testBounded` from shared) per ADR-034
- Sandbox: EPUB iframe MUST NOT have `allow-scripts`; CSP MUST have `sandbox` without `allow-scripts`

## Key Paths

- `apps/web/` — reader SPA, routing, stores
- `apps/worker/` — auth, signed-URL, R2 access, observability
- `packages/reader-core/` — EPUB loader, sanitizer, CFI, re-anchor
- `packages/shared/` — traceId/spanId, matchBounded, validators
- `docs/plans/` — GOAP + ADR records (single source for AI-agent context)
- `.github/` — workflows, composite actions, PR template
- `AGENTS.md` — top-level rules every AI agent must follow
- `llms.txt` — this file
- `llms-full.txt` — extended context (architecture, anti-patterns, skills)

## Commands

```bash
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
pnpm lint
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test:coverage
pnpm build
./scripts/quality_gate.sh   # full gate
```

## For AI Agents

Always read `AGENTS.md` and `llms-full.txt` before making changes. Use the
`goap-agent` skill for any multi-step task. Create a `docs/plans/<NNN>-…md` file
before opening a PR. Never commit to `main` directly.
